title: bridge-matrix: empty bot_localpart causes echo loop
description: BridgeConfig::validate() does not check bot_localpart. If bot_localpart is empty string, is_bot_sender() constructs bot_mxid = ':domain' (bridge.rs:123), which never matches any sender. Every message the bridge posts to Matrix is then echoed back into nie because the self-message filter is broken. Trigger: misconfigured bridge.toml with bot_localpart = ''. Fix: add bail!("bot_localpart must not be empty") to validate().
